subject: Artifacts in tomogram
body:
Hello,

I used warpTools to do frame alignment and then use etomo to reconstruct 
the tomograms. However, I noticed artifacts in the reconstructed tomogram. 
Patches of density were missing. Has anyone seen this before? What could be 
wrong that lead to this artifact? Any suggestions would be appreciated. 

Btw, what is the best way to open tomograms reconstructed with warpTools to 
visually exam them?

[image: Screenshot 2024-12-17 at 9.31.44 AM.png]

Thanks,
Chen
